# Modrinth API Sourcey Docs

> Sourcey-generated documentation for the Modrinth Labrinth API OpenAPI specification.

## Overview

- [Modrinth API Sourcey Docs](/introduction.html): Sourcey-generated documentation for the Modrinth Labrinth API OpenAPI specification.

## API Reference

- [Labrinth](/api.html): This documentation doesn't provide a way to test our API. In order to facilitate testing, we recommend the following tools:
- [Search projects](/api.html#operation-search-get): GET /search
- [Get a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-get): GET /project/{id|slug}
- [Delete a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-delete): DELETE /project/{id|slug}
- [Modify a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-patch): PATCH /project/{id|slug}
- [Get multiple projects](/api.html#operation-projects-get): GET /projects
- [Bulk-edit multiple projects](/api.html#operation-projects-patch): PATCH /projects
- [Get a list of random projects](/api.html#operation-projects-random-get): GET /projects_random
- [Create a project](/api.html#operation-project-post): POST /project
- [Delete project's icon](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-icon-delete): DELETE /project/{id|slug}/icon
- [Change project's icon](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-icon-patch): PATCH /project/{id|slug}/icon - The new icon may be up to 256KiB in size.
- [Check project slug/ID validity](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-check-get): GET /project/{id|slug}/check
- [Add a gallery image](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-gallery-post): POST /project/{id|slug}/gallery - Modrinth allows you to upload files of up to 5MiB to a project's gallery.
- [Delete a gallery image](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-gallery-delete): DELETE /project/{id|slug}/gallery
- [Modify a gallery image](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-gallery-patch): PATCH /project/{id|slug}/gallery
- [Get all of a project's dependencies](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-dependencies-get): GET /project/{id|slug}/dependencies
- [Follow a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-follow-post): POST /project/{id|slug}/follow
- [Unfollow a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-follow-delete): DELETE /project/{id|slug}/follow
- [Schedule a project](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-schedule-post): POST /project/{id|slug}/schedule
- [List project's versions](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-version-get): GET /project/{id|slug}/version
- [Get a version](/api.html#operation-version-id-get): GET /version/{id}
- [Delete a version](/api.html#operation-version-id-delete): DELETE /version/{id}
- [Modify a version](/api.html#operation-version-id-patch): PATCH /version/{id}
- [Get a version given a version number or ID](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-version-id-number-get): GET /project/{id|slug}/version/{id|number} - Please note that, if the version number provided matches multiple versions, only the **oldest matching version** will be returned.
- [Create a version](/api.html#operation-version-post): POST /version - This route creates a version on an existing project. There must be at least one file attached to each new version, unless the new version's status is `draft`. `.mrpack`, `.jar`, `.zip`, and `.litemod` files are accepted.
- [Schedule a version](/api.html#operation-version-id-schedule-post): POST /version/{id}/schedule
- [Get multiple versions](/api.html#operation-versions-get): GET /versions
- [Add files to version](/api.html#operation-version-id-file-post): POST /version/{id}/file - Project files are attached. `.mrpack` and `.jar` files are accepted.
- [Get version from hash](/api.html#operation-version-file-hash-get): GET /version_file/{hash}
- [Delete a file from its hash](/api.html#operation-version-file-hash-delete): DELETE /version_file/{hash}
- [Latest version of a project from a hash, loader(s), and game version(s)](/api.html#operation-version-file-hash-update-post): POST /version_file/{hash}/update
- [Get versions from hashes](/api.html#operation-version-files-post): POST /version_files - This is the same as [`/version_file/{hash}`](#operation/versionFromHash) except it accepts multiple hashes.
- [Latest versions of multiple project from hashes, loader(s), and game version(s)](/api.html#operation-version-files-update-post): POST /version_files/update - This is the same as [`/version_file/{hash}/update`](#operation/getLatestVersionFromHash) except it accepts multiple hashes.
- [Get a user](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-get): GET /user/{id|username}
- [Modify a user](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-patch): PATCH /user/{id|username}
- [Get user from authorization header](/api.html#operation-user-get): GET /user
- [Get multiple users](/api.html#operation-users-get): GET /users
- [Remove user's avatar](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-icon-delete): DELETE /user/{id|username}/icon
- [Change user's avatar](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-icon-patch): PATCH /user/{id|username}/icon - The new avatar may be up to 2MiB in size.
- [Get user's projects](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-projects-get): GET /user/{id|username}/projects
- [Get user's followed projects](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-follows-get): GET /user/{id|username}/follows
- [Get user's payout history](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-payouts-get): GET /user/{id|username}/payouts
- [Withdraw payout balance to PayPal or Venmo](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-payouts-post): POST /user/{id|username}/payouts - Warning: certain amounts get withheld for fees. Please do not call this API endpoint without first acknowledging the warnings on the corresponding frontend page.
- [Get user's notifications](/api.html#operation-user-id-username-notifications-get): GET /user/{id|username}/notifications
- [Get notification from ID](/api.html#operation-notification-id-get): GET /notification/{id}
- [Delete notification](/api.html#operation-notification-id-delete): DELETE /notification/{id}
- [Mark notification as read](/api.html#operation-notification-id-patch): PATCH /notification/{id}
- [Get multiple notifications](/api.html#operation-notifications-get): GET /notifications
- [Delete multiple notifications](/api.html#operation-notifications-delete): DELETE /notifications
- [Mark multiple notifications as read](/api.html#operation-notifications-patch): PATCH /notifications
- [Get your open reports](/api.html#operation-report-get): GET /report
- [Report a project, user, or version](/api.html#operation-report-post): POST /report - Bring a project, user, or version to the attention of the moderators by reporting it.
- [Get report from ID](/api.html#operation-report-id-get): GET /report/{id}
- [Modify a report](/api.html#operation-report-id-patch): PATCH /report/{id}
- [Get multiple reports](/api.html#operation-reports-get): GET /reports
- [Get a thread](/api.html#operation-thread-id-get): GET /thread/{id}
- [Send a text message to a thread](/api.html#operation-thread-id-post): POST /thread/{id}
- [Get multiple threads](/api.html#operation-threads-get): GET /threads
- [Delete a thread message](/api.html#operation-message-id-delete): DELETE /message/{id}
- [Get a project's team members](/api.html#operation-project-id-slug-members-get): GET /project/{id|slug}/members
- [Get a team's members](/api.html#operation-team-id-members-get): GET /team/{id}/members
- [Add a user to a team](/api.html#operation-team-id-members-post): POST /team/{id}/members
- [Get the members of multiple teams](/api.html#operation-teams-get): GET /teams
- [Join a team](/api.html#operation-team-id-join-post): POST /team/{id}/join
- [Remove a member from a team](/api.html#operation-team-id-members-id-username-delete): DELETE /team/{id}/members/{id|username}
- [Modify a team member's information](/api.html#operation-team-id-members-id-username-patch): PATCH /team/{id}/members/{id|username}
- [Transfer team's ownership to another user](/api.html#operation-team-id-owner-patch): PATCH /team/{id}/owner
- [Get a list of categories](/api.html#operation-tag-category-get): GET /tag/category - Gets an array of categories, their icons, and applicable project types
- [Get a list of loaders](/api.html#operation-tag-loader-get): GET /tag/loader - Gets an array of loaders, their icons, and supported project types
- [Get a list of game versions](/api.html#operation-tag-game-version-get): GET /tag/game_version - Gets an array of game versions and information about them
- [Get a list of licenses](/api.html#operation-tag-license-get): GET /tag/license - Deprecated - simply use SPDX IDs.
- [Get the text and title of a license](/api.html#operation-tag-license-id-get): GET /tag/license/{id}
- [Get a list of donation platforms](/api.html#operation-tag-donation-platform-get): GET /tag/donation_platform - Gets an array of donation platforms and information about them
- [Get a list of report types](/api.html#operation-tag-report-type-get): GET /tag/report_type - Gets an array of valid report types
- [Get a list of project types](/api.html#operation-tag-project-type-get): GET /tag/project_type - Gets an array of valid project types
- [Get a list of side types](/api.html#operation-tag-side-type-get): GET /tag/side_type - Gets an array of valid side types
- [Forge Updates JSON file](/api.html#operation-updates-id-slug-forge-updates-json-get): GET /updates/{id|slug}/forge_updates.json - If you're a Forge mod developer, your Modrinth mods have an automatically generated `updates.json` using the
- [Various statistics about this Modrinth instance](/api.html#operation-statistics-get): GET /statistics
